faqs.question: What is infrared camera leak detection?
faqs.answer: Infrared camera detection uses thermal imaging to identify temperature differences caused by hidden water leaks behind walls, under floors, and in ceilings — all without any demolition.

faqs.question: What is hydrostatic pressure testing?
faqs.answer: Hydrostatic pressure testing isolates sections of your plumbing system and pressurizes them to identify leaks in drain and sewer lines beneath your foundation.

faqs.question: When should I consider advanced leak detection?
faqs.answer: If you have unexplained water damage, rising water bills, musty odors, or suspect a slab leak, advanced detection methods can pinpoint the exact location without unnecessary excavation. Contact us for an assessment.

faqs.question: Is advanced leak detection more expensive than traditional methods?
faqs.answer: While the technology is specialized, it often saves money overall by avoiding unnecessary demolition and pinpointing leaks precisely on the first attempt, reducing total repair costs.
